name: sbom produces a deterministic digest: the same component set yields the same digest across runs
command: printf '%s' '{"dependencies":{"lodash":"4.17.21","express":"4.18.0"}}' > package.json && a=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sbom.sh" --root . 2>&1 | grep -oE 'digest=[^ ]+'); b=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sbom.sh" --root . 2>&1 | grep -oE 'digest=[^ ]+'); [ -n "$a" ] && [ "$a" = "$b" ] && echo h15-deterministic 1>&2
